name: Beverly Municipal
description_short: Beverly Municipal Federal Credit Union is a small NCUA-insured credit union headquartered in Beverly, MA, offering savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and loans to members.
description_long: Beverly Municipal Federal Credit Union was established in 1985 and operates as a federally chartered credit union with NCUA insurance protection. The institution is based in Beverly, Massachusetts, and serves its membership through a community-focused lending and deposit services model. With approximately $25.92 million in assets, $23.19 million in deposits, and $18.34 million in loans outstanding, Beverly Municipal represents a small, localized financial institution. Beverly Municipal offers a range of standard credit union products including savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), mortgages (both 15-year and 30-year), home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), auto loans, personal loans, and home equity loans. The credit union maintains physical branch locations in Beverly, MA for in-person member service. As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Beverly Municipal operates on a member-owned cooperative model and is subject to federal NCUA oversight. The institution's small asset base ($25.92 million) positions it as a community-focused lender with localized decision-making. Their headquarters location and branch infrastructure suggest service primarily to the Beverly, Massachusetts area and surrounding communities. A significant limitation is that the website data shows incomplete rate information—current deposit rates and loan rates were not available as of the April 2026 snapshot, with the site indicating "We do not yet have rates for Beverly Municipal" and encouraging members to contact the credit union directly. The small asset size limits lending capacity and product sophistication compared to larger institutions. Prospective members should contact the institution directly to confirm current rates, product availability, and membership eligibility requirements.
pros: NCUA-insured deposits, providing federal protection up to applicable limits
Competitive 1-year CD rate of 4.59% APY as of the data snapshot
Established 40+ year history (founded 1985) providing institutional stability
Credit union member-owned structure typically offers lower fees than banks
Offers multiple loan products including mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and HELOCs
Physical branch locations in Beverly, MA for in-person member service
Federally chartered with clear regulatory oversight and compliance standards
cons: Very small institution ($25.92M in assets) limits lending capacity and product breadth compared to larger credit unions and banks
Current rates information incomplete on website—deposit and loan rates unavailable, requiring direct member contact
Likely membership eligibility restrictions common to credit unions; geographic/employment requirements unclear
Limited digital information about fees, minimum balances, or account requirements
No mention of online banking, mobile app, or remote account opening capabilities
best_for: Beverly, MA residents and surrounding communities seeking local credit union membership
Savers prioritizing NCUA federal insurance and community-based lending practices
Consumers willing to contact the institution directly to obtain current rate and product information
Members seeking traditional banking products (mortgages, CDs, savings) from an established local institution
diagnosis: Beverly Municipal is best for Beverly, MA-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking with federal NCUA insurance and community-based service. The main caveat is that the institution's small asset base ($25.92M) significantly limits product offerings and lending capacity, and current rate and product information must be obtained directly from the credit union rather than verified online.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Beverly Municipal Federal Credit Union is an NCUA-insured credit union in Beverly, MA offering savings accounts and mortgages.
